title: Alvin Cheung | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Alvin Cheung | EECS at UC Berkeley Alvin Cheung: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Alvin Cheung Associate Professor Contact Information 785 Soda Hall akcheung@cs.berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Publications Dissertations Research Support Laman Sadaghiani 633 Davis lsadaghiani@berkeley.edu Research Areas Database Management Systems (DBMS) Programming Systems (PS) Research Centers EPIC Data lab (EPIC) Sky Computing Lab (Sky) SpeciaLIzed Computing Ecosystems (SLICE) Teaching Schedule CS 186. Seshia, " LLM-Based Code Translation Needs Formal Compositional Reasoning ," EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley, Tech. Rep. UCB/EECS-2025-174, Oct. 2025. X. Chen, L. Gong, A. Selected Honors and Awards ACSIC Rock Star Award , 2025 AITO Dahl Nygaard Junior Prize , 2024 VLDB Early Career Award , 2023 Army Research Office Young Investigator Award , 2022 ACM SIGPLAN Distinguished Paper Award (PLDI) , 2022 Office of Naval Research Young Investigator , 2021 ACM SIGCHI Best Paper Award , 2021 Intel Outstanding Researcher Award , 2020 IEEE CS TCDE Early Career/Rising Star Award , 2020 VMware Early Career Faculty Award , 2020 DOE Presidential Early Career Award for Scientists & Engineers (PECASE) , 2019 ACM SIGSOFT Distinguished Paper Award , 2019 Sloan Research Fellow , 2019 Google Faculty Research Award , 2018 ACM SIGMOD Best Demonstration Award , 2017 DOE Early Career Research Award , 2016 NSF Faculty Early Career Development Award (CAREER) , 2016
